summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The diff shows index.css updated with a blue --background (oklch(0.32 0.12 240)), white --foreground, forced dark text on inputs/labels, and white card backgrounds with dark card-foreground. App.tsx, ResumeForm.tsx are updated with inline dark text styles on cards. WelcomeScreen.tsx and ResumePreview.tsx are referenced in the file summaries as updated. All core requirements appear covered.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode CSS variables (.dark selector) were added/updated in index.css
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Adding dark mode toggling' as a non-goal, and does not request dark mode CSS variable updates. The diff includes a full .dark block with dark-mode-specific variable overrides.
